narrative:
Precinct Avon City 3-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 961 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a clear Republican lean of 6.1 percentage points.
